name: Fleet Management
description: Vehicles, compliance (MOT/tax/insurance), VDI at /VDIs, dynamic inspection forms, issue kanban, VIN/ID photos, auto VOR on expired compliance, employee portal Fleet link.
changelog: Portal form access (VDI vs safety): Fleet admin → Portal form access — role groups from manifest + roles table; employee portal and /VDIs enforce selections.

declared_permissions.description: Create/edit vehicles, compliance, maintenance, driver assignments.

declared_permissions.label: Fleet — driver
